control_awareness: The system enforces pre-PO approval and amount-based approval thresholds. The requester cannot approve their own request, so the approval will be routed to the department head.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will trigger the required department head approval before purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: Since there is no quarter-end pressure and the amount requires department head approval, creating one consolidated purchase request for the full amount with normal routing aligns with operational preferences and control requirements.
reason: The purchase amount is 1,750,000 which requires department_head approval as per the amount-based approval control. Creating a single purchase request with the full amount is operationally reasonable and preferred for clarity and auditability.
